Death Vine

Triggers: Once in a while

Deadly Guillotine
Decreases the physical and magic armor of a random enemy by 70% for 5 sec. During this time, if the target's health drops below 35%, the owner of the artifact instantly kills the target and all allies restore 20% of the target's max health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
